title: BBL Cloche
description: Adds a cloche block used to grow seeds and saplings !
body:
# __**BBL Cloche**__

## **__Overview__**

BBL Cloche adds a new block that can be used to grow crops inside a block. Support most of vanilla crops, seeds and saplings!

## __**Upgrades**__

This mod has various different upgrades that can be crafted to make your crops grow faster, produce more items and shear trees to get there leaves. In 26.1 also features Mutation upgrades which can be used to make your crops even better!

## __**Support**__

Join the BBL [Discord](https://discord.gg/benbenlaw) for support, report bugs and suggest features or additions. You can also support me on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/benbenlaw) to gain Alpha access to Modpacks and Mods in dev
